name: DotPe
description: India-based merchant payments and digital storefront platform — digital menu, QR ordering, PhonePe/Google-backed.

seo.title: DotPe — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: DotPe: India-based merchant payments and digital storefront platform — digital menu, QR ordering, PhonePe/Google-backed.

when_to_use: QR-based digital ordering and payment for Indian F&B merchants
UPI and PhonePe-backed digital storefront for Indian SMB retailers
In-person QR payment with digital menu for restaurant table orders in India
Omni-channel digital payment for Indian merchant acquiring

review.verdict: Merchant platform, not a pure gateway — ideal for Indian SMBs wanting storefront plus acceptance bundled.
review.best_for: Indian restaurants and small retailers wanting QR ordering and payments
review.not_for: Developers needing a headless payment API

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
